# ShakiLabs UI artifact

`shakilabs-ui-0.3.5.tgz` is the active exact artifact for `@shakilabs/ui` 0.3.5.

- Source repository: `00.root-shakilabs`
- Source commit: `9d1756501ce04aadd67a3a5790339b1f780a6ad5`
- SHA-256: `80ef3a8ac188d14df21de8eca60c7b26decfd2c367a76b5bedc1d548804b92ed`

Only the active exact artifact is committed so an isolated Vercel checkout can run `npm ci` without a private registry token.
